Research

Research Areas

Sensing the world, learning from it, and never breaking stride — our work spans CPS resilience, intrusion detection, and intelligent data-driven systems.

🔐

Cyber Security

Research in intrusion detection, federated learning for IDS, SMS OTP hardening, and network traffic characterization for adaptive anomaly detection.

· Federated Learning IDS · NetBeat · SMS OTP Hardening
Explore →
🧠

Applied Artificial Intelligence

Machine learning and explainable AI applied to sports analytics, adversarial robustness, and intelligent decision support in critical engineering domains.

· AI for Sport · Explainable AI (XAI)
Explore →
⚙️

Cyber-Physical Systems

Digital twin modelling of CPS infrastructure, spatio-temporal air quality prediction, and resilience testing using integrated network and power-system simulation.

· CPS Digital Twin · Spatio-Temporal AQ
Explore →

Cyber-Physical Resilient & Intelligent Systems
